sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check positions
seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
for n in seg:
    color = n['color']
    rows = [p[0] for p in n['boundary']]
    cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
    if color in ['b', 'c', 'M']:
        print(f"{color}: rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")

# Check ascii around overlap area
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\n--- Rows 0-12, cols 18-42 ---")
for i in range(0, 13):
    if i < len(ascii_lines):
        print(f"Row {i}: {ascii_lines[i][18:42]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
